message:
fix(policy,core): detect bypass tokens in shell subshells and resolve clippy warnings

Extend has_trauma_bypass_prefix() to strip leading parentheses and braces
before matching FT_BYPASS_TRAUMA=1, preventing bypass tokens hidden in
shell syntax like (FT_BYPASS_TRAUMA=1 ...) or { FT_BYPASS_TRAUMA=1 ... }.

Also resolve clippy warnings across frankenterm-core and frankenterm-gui:
- Replace unwrap_or() with match/unwrap_or_else() for clarity and lazy eval
- Remove unnecessary .to_lowercase() calls on already-lowercase strings
- Fix SQL keyword casing (Integer → INTEGER)
- Remove unnecessary borrow operators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
